CustomField.description: Use this field when the FH:FC applicable for MR calculation differs from the Calculated FH:FC. If updated, the Effective FH:FC will be recalculated and applied to the MR calculation.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Use this field when the FH:FC applicable for MR calculation differs from the Calculated FH:FC. If updated, the Effective FH:FC will be recalculated and applied to the MR calculation.
CustomField.label: Override FH:FC
